enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pachchai Thee?

The song Pachchai Thee expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of a romantic relationship.

How does Pachchai Thee fit into the plot of Baahubali?

This song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film's narrative.

Who are the singers of Pachchai Thee?

The song is sung by the talented duo Damini and Karthik, whose voices blend beautifully to create a captivating experience.

Who composed the music for Pachchai Thee?

The music for this enchanting song was composed by the renowned MM Keeravani, known for his exceptional work in film music.

When was Pachchai Thee released?

The song was released on June 24, 2015, as part of the Baahubali soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pachchai Thee, the characters experience a whirlwind of emotions that reflect the intensity of their love. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in Baahubali, showcasing the beauty and passion of their relationship. With its romantic lyrics and captivating melody, it evokes feelings of joy and longing. The collaboration between Damini and Karthik, under the masterful direction of MM Keeravani, makes this track a memorable highlight of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pachchai Thee from Baahubali is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and passion. With the enchanting voices of Damini and Karthik, paired with MM Keeravani's magical composition, this song is sure to resonate with your heart. Dive into a world of romance and energy that makes this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Are you the green flame? Am I the crazy flower? With just one glance, you have taken over my heart.
I am the victor, and you are the fierce fire; have you created beauty in me?
You are the star that shines in my heart, the flower that has joined hands with me.
Our hands will create new skies together, soaring high.
Are you the green flame? Am I the crazy flower? With just one glance, you have taken over my heart.
I have come to see my path among the people, like a mountain that has come together.
I have seen that you have a heart within you.
I still feel you around me, and I am overwhelmed with emotions.
You are the star that shines in my heart, the flower that is blooming in the fields.
I am connecting with your essence, and I see the emotions within me.
Are you the green flame? Am I the crazy flower? With just one glance, you have taken over my heart.
The songs that will emerge from the depths will bring forth the first enchantments.
Even if life takes many forms, I will never forget your presence.
I have come to ask for the paths to be opened.
You are the star that shines in my heart, the flower that drips honey in my eyes.
I have immersed myself in your heart, and I see the love that I long for.
Are you the green flame? Am I the crazy flower? With just one glance, you have taken over my heart.
I am the victor, and you are the fierce fire; have you created beauty in me?
